description: This file contains React functional components representing different UI states: LoadingState, ErrorState, and EmptyState. Each component renders a styled card with relevant messages and optional actions, used for visual feedback during data fetching, error handling, or absence of data.

methods.name: LoadingState
methods.description: A React functional component displaying a loading indicator with optional title and subtitle.

methods.name: ErrorState
methods.description: A React functional component displaying an error message with optional title, message, and action.

methods.name: EmptyState
methods.description: A React functional component indicating that there are no items, with optional title, message, and action.
